name: claude-harness
description: Long-running agent harness with PRD analysis, unified workflow, 5-layer memory architecture, failure prevention, self-improving skills, optional TDD via --tdd flag, bug fix tracking, GitHub integration, Agent Pipeline orchestration (auto-detect complexity, Research-Implement-Review via Task tool subagents), parallel work streams, native Tasks integration, effort-optimized phases, 128K output support, autonomous multi-feature batch processing, dynamic command sync, full hook coverage (12 registrations: branch safety, async verification, subagent context injection, failure learning, compaction recovery), and consolidated command set (5 commands)
